message:
feat(gateway): add circuit breaker for tool health checks (bd-2gkx.1)

New circuit-breaker.service.ts implements per-tool circuit breakers with:
- CLOSED → OPEN → HALF_OPEN → CLOSED state machine
- Configurable failure threshold (default: 3)
- Exponential backoff (30s initial, 5min max)
- withCircuitBreaker() wrapper for async checks
- getAllBreakerStatuses() for monitoring

Integrated into /health/detailed route:
- DCG, CASS, UBS checks wrapped with circuit breakers
- Breaker status exposed in health response
- Cached failure results annotated with circuitBreakerOpen

19 passing unit tests covering state transitions, backoff,
configuration, counters, and the wrapper function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
